title: Can I create a SigMap for RTLIL::Design?
body:
I would like to create a path to detect FSMs in the entire design. In other words, I do not want to detect FSMs on a module-by-module basis as `fsm_detect.cc`, but I want to detect FSMs in the entire design.
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/4da3f2878bb873726c6ac9233fe937d8c788993c/passes/fsm/fsm_detect.cc#L287-L315

To analyze the circuit structure of the entire design, I need to create a canonical map of the entire design using SigMap. However, the SigMap interface seems to be able to create a canonical map only on a module-by-module basis (RTLIL::Module).
https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/blob/4da3f2878bb873726c6ac9233fe937d8c788993c/kernel/sigtools.h#L252-L263

Is it possible to do this? I would like to know a solution.
